title: clausena harmandiana
intro: Clausena harmandiana, also known as the Thai plai or Thai ginger, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to Southeast Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Clausena harmandiana include relieving headaches, fever, and digestive issues, as well as providing antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Clausena harmandiana is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional Thai medicine to treat various ailments.
